slides.title: S3 Framework: three steps to deploy AI in your company without wasting budget
Launching five AI projects at once burns budget and erodes team confidence

slides.headline: Map real usage before proposing a tool
slides.body: Your teams already use ChatGPT, Copilot or Gemini outside any framework. The Scan inventories those uses, identifies one high-value case and sets the ROI indicator from day one.

slides.headline: Deliver one case in four to eight weeks
slides.body: A short sprint turns the identified process into a usable tool. The scope stays narrow so real impact can be measured, not just promised.

slides.headline: Expand when the numbers prove adoption
slides.body: Once the first case is validated, the scope extends department by department. Shadow AI becomes a piloted, secure, coherent practice.

slides.label: of French companies use generative AI at end of 2025, up from 31% one year earlier
of the French working population uses generative AI at end of 2025
